accelerator_on-chip_memories: Approx. 64 MB Infinity Cache (L3) plus register files and local caches
cooling: Liquid-cooled GPU chassis with datacenter air-assisted cooling
disk_controllers: Onboard NVMe controllers integrated with system board
disk_drives: 8 x 7.68 TB NVMe SSD (61.44 TB total local storage)
host_memory_configuration: Multi-channel DDR5 across dual AMD EPYC sockets
host_networking: 2 x 200 Gbps front-end NICs (400 Gbps total) plus high-speed cluster network
host_networking_topology: Leaf‑spine Clos fabric with RDMA-capable cluster interconnect
host_processor_caches: Per-core L1/L2 plus shared L3 cache (EPYC 9004/9005 series typical hierarchy)
host_processor_frequency: Base ~2.0 GHz, boost up to ~3.8 GHz
host_processor_interconnect: AMD Infinity Fabric between sockets and I/O
nics_enabled_connected: 2 x 200 Gbps front-end NICs active; additional cluster NICs for RDMA
power_supply_details: Redundant datacenter PSUs sized for 125 kW per rack deployments
sw_notes: System typically deployed with ROCm stack and standard OCI GPU images for AI/HPC workloads.
